name: Man in the Mirror
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At turn end, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus. When taking DMG, gain Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of the DMG at the start of next turn. If the current Realm is {Caro}, gain {Crimson Furnace} Healing equal to [StateArg2]% of the DMG instead.
